---
title: 'Christmas 2009'
date: '2010-01-04T04:08:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '5109156679615714780'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2229086196853434025'
blogger_filename: '/2010/01/christmas-2009.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/5109156679615714780/feed.atom'
---

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">Ladies and Gentleman...<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">Introducing the Wolfe Family Bulldogs<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">Christmas 2009<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: center;">Decorating Ginger Bread Men...<br />
</div><div style="text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020350-3cfc0795f6e6.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020350-0e091bbcb111.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">Connor<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">&nbsp;<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020349-cd81343f6e47.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020349-860358af0b57.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">Preston<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">EATING Ginger Bread Leftovers! <br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020351-f1ee6083da88.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020351-80e502ec8efa.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><br />
<div style="text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: center;">Finished! Ginger Bread Man, Woman and Two Boys<br />
</div><div style="text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020354-8fc632a0f619.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020354-ff3f82f79dd1.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">Daddy, Mommy, Connor, Preston<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020359-c2d15617965f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020359-b10b37a3a9af.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">Wolfe Family Annual Tradition <br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">Christmas EVE<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">Year 1<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">NEW Nerf Guns every year!<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">This time we started with the basic Six Shooter variety... stick em up partner!<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020365-2b8404ce1503.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020365-e608b8f80b8c.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">WOW! New HIPPO Game!<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020366-dead2bf6b652.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020366-1f0da0498abe.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">Connor: Hey there Preston... what did YOU get...<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020374-e6d882900533.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020374-2bc873154ede.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">Daddy got a new sweater<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020372-7fdd1c7ae1aa.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020372-0cbf9cd50a4d.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">COOL! New Board Games...<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020371-c2eda5ae64c0.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020371-4de956a34d1b.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">Kids Bingo!<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020387-8cc1ca262730.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020387-109d7f051798.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">I'll look pretty Snazzy in that! <br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">On to the<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">BIG EVENT!!<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020392-28d366d45b4e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020392-5b66611326a5.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">&nbsp;NEW TRAIN TABLE!!!<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020395-d96f05d375b7.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020395-fdaec4ccd294.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">&nbsp;<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020394-aa0a2fe1b1bb.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020394-22a0b3ead1ee.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">&nbsp;<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020393-880054c61d18.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020393-05f7ef443737.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">Did you know... That you can have what you sing?<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">SNOW on Christmas eve...<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">Which to date<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">(01/03/2009 at this posting)<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">...can still be seen in a few hidden patches on the way to church!<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">These pictures taken Christmas Morning!<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">&nbsp;<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020399-2575b874a43e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020399-e678f28fd57b.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><div style="text-align: center;">From our balcony!<br />
</div><div style="text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020400-644bf305ec85.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020400-25ba46f25cd0.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">Overlooking the playground in the distance...<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020398-92d5eefcc3fe.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020398-3743e9db3bb4.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">ON OUR BALCONY!!<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">Did I mention we live on the THIRD floor? WOW!<br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020397-72c8ba0d2fa2.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1020397-e211c1caa283.jpg" /></a><br />
</div><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">The Door to our Balcony. <br />
</div><div style="text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div>
